subcodes.first_line: The ocean of utterance hath surged in response to the stirring fragrance of thy love for God, the Lord of all worlds. Say: O concourse of the earth, by God! verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ماج بحر البیان بما هاج عرف حبک لله رب العالمین قل یا ملا الارض تالله انه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power of prayer, @humility; meekness; lowliness
